text: Gemini can sometimes get stuck in processing. We need to activate the watchdog after >15min of processing and check the situation. If the current processing is actually > 15min "(esc to cancel, 15m 8s)" watchdog should be able to call an action "interrupt" which inserts 2 times esc. key press in the main agent session

status.comment: Implemented watchdog long-processing escalation for '(esc to cancel, 15m 8s)' sessions: added duration parsing, escalation path to ask watchdog once threshold is exceeded, interrupt action support with double ESC in worker session, and prompt/action schema updates. Verified with updated watchdog tests and targeted typecheck (both pass).
